title: June 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 14''' is the 165th day of the year (166th in leap years), with 200 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1900s|1909]] – [[Burl Ives]] is born.
*[[1940s|1945]] – [[Stephen J. Sansweet]] is born.
*[[1950s|1950]] – [[Jeremy Sinden]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 19|''Star Wars Weekly'' 19]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 75|''Star Wars'' (1977) 75]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 54|''Star Wars Insider'' 54]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Rebellion 3|''Rebellion'' 3]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Hope (cinematic trailer)|''Hope'']] trailer released.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars Insider 126|''Star Wars Insider'' 126]] published.
*[[2014]] - [[Terry Richards]] dies.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars: ABC-3PO]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Finn and Poe Team Up!]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Insider 166|''Star Wars Insider'' 166]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 32|''Star Wars'' (2015) 32]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Han Solo - From Smuggler to General]]" premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Insider Presents: Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season Two Collector's Edition Volume One]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 35|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 35]] published.
*2023 – [[Sana Starros 5|''Sana Starros'' 5]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Fun with Nubs]]'' premiered on the [[StarWarsKids.com]] YouTube channel with "[[Nubs Loses his Lightsaber]]", "[[RJ Repairs the Firehawk]]", "[[Nubs Cleans Up]]", and "[[RJ Needs a Tool]]".
*[[2025]] – [[Maroussia Frank]] dies.
